label: Theorem proving & symbolic deduction

node.label: Theorem proving & symbolic deduction
node.definition: Theorem provers derive conclusions from axioms and inference rules, producing proofs or proof obligations that a trusted kernel can check.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Theorem proving & symbolic deduction is to connect Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving, Neuro-symbolic models to downstream capabilities including Automated theorem proving & mathematical AI.
examples: substrate for Automated theorem proving & mathematical AI
combined with Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving
limitations: Search and self-evaluation can multiply cost while preserving confident errors when states, tools, or verifiers are weak. Its direct dependencies include Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving, Neuro-symbolic models.

dependencies.rationale: Theorem proving & symbolic deduction uses Constraint satisfaction, SAT & SMT solving as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Theorem proving & symbolic deduction uses Neuro-symbolic models as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Theorem proving & symbolic deduction uses Programs, ASTs, bytecode & intermediate representations as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
